warnings.issue: Product type is null. Non-critical but collection filtering and breadcrumbs that rely on product.type will render empty.
All 8 product images have null alt text. Conversion agents must provide a fallback using product.title for accessibility (e.g. {{ image.alt | default: product.title }}).

Option name is 'Quantity' but values represent bundle tiers ('1 Bottle', 'Buy 2 Get 1 Free', 'Buy 3 Get 2 Free'). This is a bundle-style variant selector, not a traditional quantity picker. Conversion agents should render this as a card/pill selector rather than a dropdown, and should NOT render a separate quantity input if the variant already implies quantity.

All variants have compare_at_price set. Sale badge and savings display should be rendered. Price differences are significant (47–68% off) — conversion agents should consider showing a 'Save X%' or 'Save $X' indicator per variant.
No tags were extracted. product.tags will be empty unless the Shopify store has tags assigned. Conversion agents should not rely on tags for conditional rendering.
